title: galium viscosum var. gibraltaricum
intro: Galium viscosum var. gibraltaricum, also known as sticky bedstraw, is a rare and unique variety of the Galium viscosum species, a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, particularly in the Gibraltar area. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
